# Decision: numeric option scoring

## What it does for you

Options are ranked by a single numeric score so the best choice is obvious at a
glance.

## How it works

Each option is scored independently and the list is sorted in descending order.
This decision governs [capability.option-scoring](../capabilities/option-scoring.md).
